$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tag Close component - a close/dismiss icon button used in tags and badges. Supports three variants: standalone icon, icon with circular background (bold stroke), and icon with circular background (thin stroke). Includes four sizes (xs, sm, md, lg) with interaction states. Figma Reference: Node ID 393-789

$component.name: Tag Close
$component.description: A mobile close/dismiss icon button component used to remove tags, badges, or dismiss elements. Supports three visual variants: standalone X icon without background, X icon with circular background using bold stroke, and X icon with circular background using thin stroke. All variants support multiple sizes and interaction states.
$component.structure: Optional circular container with background, containing a centered X/close icon. Standalone variant has no container, only the icon. Circular variants have fully rounded background with icon centered inside.

sizes.xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px-14px icon
sizes.sm: Small size for standard mobile interfaces - typically 16px-18px icon
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - typically 20px-24px icon
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile tags - typically 24px-28px icon

variants.standalone: X icon without any background container - minimal style for compact spaces
variants.bold: X icon with circular background and bold/thick stroke weight - prominent and easy to tap
variants.thin: X icon with circular background and thin stroke weight - subtle and refined appearance

usage.contexts: Mobile tags, badges, chips, filter pills, removable items, dismissible notifications, multi-select tags, search filters
usage.features: Close/dismiss functionality, multiple visual styles, size variants, interaction states (hover, pressed, focused, disabled), circular background option, stroke weight variants

container.$comment: Container properties for tag close variants with circular background (bold and thin variants)

xs.description: Mobile tag close container size for xs - 12px (circular background diameter)

sm.description: Mobile tag close container size for sm - 14px (circular background diameter)

md.description: Mobile tag close container size for md - 16px (circular background diameter)

lg.description: Mobile tag close container size for lg - 20px (circular background diameter)

radius.description: Mobile tag close container border radius - fully rounded circle

background.$comment: Background colors for circular container variants (bold and thin)

default.description: Mobile tag close container default background - gray/200 - #eaecf0

focused.description: Mobile tag close container focused background - white/base - #ffffff

disabled.description: Mobile tag close container disabled background - gray/50 - #f9fafb

icon.$comment: Icon colors for the X/close icon across all interaction states

color.$comment: Icon colors for the X/close icon across all interaction states

default.description: Mobile tag close icon default color - gray/600 - #475467

focused.description: Mobile tag close icon focused color - gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Mobile tag close icon disabled color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

effects.$comment: Visual effects for mobile tag close - focus outline and shadows

focused.description: Mobile tag close focus outline - neutral outline for accessibility
Mobile tag close focus shadow - focus 2xs neutral 100 for visual focus indicator
